result.stdout:
1.2.22.0

Usage: n3o-tool [command] [options]

Options:
  --version     Show version information.
  --verbose     Show verbose output, useful for debugging
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  clients       Generate OpenAPI clients
  prepack       Prepares .csproj files for packing by adding any transitive
                NuGet references
  templates     Template related commands

Run 'n3o-tool [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
1.2.22.0

Usage: n3o-tool [command] [options]

Options:
  --version     Show version information.
  --verbose     Show verbose output, useful for debugging
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  clients       Generate OpenAPI clients
  prepack       Prepares .csproj files for packing by adding any transitive
                NuGet references
  templates     Template related commands

Run 'n3o-tool [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Generate OpenAPI clients

Usage: n3o-tool clients [options]

Options:
  --connect-api          Specifies whether clients are being generated for the
                         N3O Connect API
  --exclude-models-from  Specify one or more URLs whose models should be
                         excluded (split using | )
  --exclude-models       Specify which models should be excluded (split using |
                         )
  --include-models       Specify which models should be included (split using |
                         )
  --header               Specifies one ore more headers to be sent with the HTTP
                         request when downloading the OpenAPI JSON (format is
                         name: value)
  --language             The language of the client, must be one of
                         typescript|csharp
  --name                 The name of the client
  --namespace            The namespace of the client (when generating C#
                         clients)
  --no-models            Specifies whether models should be generated or not
  --output-path          The output path for the generated client
  --package-description  The npm package description (when generating TypeScript
                         clients)
  --package-name         The npm package name (when generating TypeScript
                         clients)
  --path                 The full path of the OpenAPI JSON file
  --url                  The full URL of the OpenAPI JSON file
  --verbose              Show verbose output, useful for debugging
  -?|-h|--help           Show help information.

commands.payload:
Generate OpenAPI clients

Usage: n3o-tool clients [options]

Options:
  --connect-api          Specifies whether clients are being generated for the
                         N3O Connect API
  --exclude-models-from  Specify one or more URLs whose models should be
                         excluded (split using | )
  --exclude-models       Specify which models should be excluded (split using |
                         )
  --include-models       Specify which models should be included (split using |
                         )
  --header               Specifies one ore more headers to be sent with the HTTP
                         request when downloading the OpenAPI JSON (format is
                         name: value)
  --language             The language of the client, must be one of
                         typescript|csharp
  --name                 The name of the client
  --namespace            The namespace of the client (when generating C#
                         clients)
  --no-models            Specifies whether models should be generated or not
  --output-path          The output path for the generated client
  --package-description  The npm package description (when generating TypeScript
                         clients)
  --package-name         The npm package name (when generating TypeScript
                         clients)
  --path                 The full path of the OpenAPI JSON file
  --url                  The full URL of the OpenAPI JSON file
  --verbose              Show verbose output, useful for debugging
  -?|-h|--help           Show help information.

result.stdout:
Prepares .csproj files for packing by adding any transitive NuGet references

Usage: n3o-tool prepack [options]

Options:
  -p|--path     The root folder for the project, if not specified defaults to
                current folder
  --verbose     Show verbose output, useful for debugging
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

commands.payload:
Template related commands

Usage: n3o-tool templates [command] [options]

Options:
  --verbose     Show verbose output, useful for debugging
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  preview       Generate a preview of a template

Run 'templates [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Generate a preview of a template

Usage: n3o-tool templates preview [options]

Options:
  -f|--format           The format of the template, must be one of email|pdf|sms
  -i|--input-file       The path to the input file
  -m|--models-file      The path to a file containing any custom merge models
  -o|--output-file      The path to the output file
  -s|--subscription-id  The subscription ID of the template
  -t|--template-id      The ID of the template
  --verbose             Show verbose output, useful for debugging
  -?|-h|--help          Show help information.

commands.payload:
Generate a preview of a template

Usage: n3o-tool templates preview [options]

Options:
  -f|--format           The format of the template, must be one of email|pdf|sms
  -i|--input-file       The path to the input file

  -o|--output-file      The path to the output file
  -s|--subscription-id  The subscription ID of the template
  -t|--template-id      The ID of the template

  -?|-h|--help          Show help information.
